subject.descriptionZh: 组合、递推、计数、离散结构与基础证明方法；图论相关内容归入“图论与组合优化”。
subject.descriptionJa: 組合せ、漸化式、数え上げ、離散構造、基礎的な証明方法。グラフ理論関連は「グラフ理論・組合せ最適化」に分類する。
subject.descriptionEn: Combinatorics, recurrences, counting, discrete structures, and basic proof methods. Graph-related content lives under Graph Theory & Combinatorial Optimization.

Discrete-Mathematics.Combinatorics.subject: Discrete-Mathematics
Discrete-Mathematics.Combinatorics.descriptionZh: 组合计数、二项式系数、卡特兰数与递推关系。
Discrete-Mathematics.Combinatorics.descriptionJa: 組合せ数え上げ、二項係数、カタラン数、漸化式。
Discrete-Mathematics.Combinatorics.descriptionEn: Combinatorial counting, binomial coefficients, Catalan numbers, and recurrence relations.
